sourceMovie.title: Moonrise Kingdom
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit Moonrise Kingdom for the same reason it broke through in 2012: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a drama rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Wes Anderson keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The comedy and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Submarine
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Moonrise Kingdom clicked for you, Submarine (2011) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Beautiful Girls
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Moonrise Kingdom clicked for you, Beautiful Girls (1996) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and drama, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Moonrise Kingdom?
faq.answer: Try Submarine, Beautiful Girls, The Longest Ride—each shares DNA with Moonrise Kingdom while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Moonrise Kingdom?
faq.answer: Moonrise Kingdom (2012) is best described as Comedy, Drama, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Moonrise Kingdom worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.7/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
